vocabulary.example: 良好的饮食习惯，即荤素搭配、控制糖分，是预防慢性病的基础。
vocabulary.translation: Good dietary habits — namely, balancing meat and vegetables and controlling sugar — form the basis for preventing chronic diseases.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn jí hūn sù dā pèi kòng zhì táng fēn shì yù fáng màn xìng bìng de jī chǔ

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: That is / Namely / Which is (formal)
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 良好的饮食习惯，___荤素搭配、控制糖分，是预防慢性病的基础。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 良好的饮食习惯，___荤素搭配、控制糖分，是预防慢性病的基础。
mini_exercises.question_english: Good dietary habits — namely, balancing meat and vegetables and controlling sugar — form the basis for preventing chronic diseases.

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'That is / Namely / Which is (formal)'?

vocabulary.example: 个别人群对某些食物过敏，需要特别注意饮食搭配。
vocabulary.translation: Certain individuals are allergic to some foods and need to pay special attention to dietary combinations.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: gè bié rén qún duì mǒu xiē shí wù guò mǐn xū yào tè bié zhù yì yǐn shí dā pèi

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Individual / Particular / Isolated (case)
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___人群对某些食物过敏，需要特别注意饮食搭配。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___人群对某些食物过敏，需要特别注意饮食搭配。
mini_exercises.question_english: Certain individuals are allergic to some foods and need to pay special attention to dietary combinations.

key_sentences.chinese: 关键在于养成长期均衡饮食的习惯，而不是短期节食。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guān jiàn zài yú yǎng chéng cháng qī jūn héng yǐn shí de xí guàn, ér bú shì duǎn qī jié shí.
key_sentences.english: The key lies in developing long-term balanced eating habits, not short-term dieting.

key_sentences.chinese: 不仅如此，规律的饮食时间对血糖稳定也至关重要。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, guī lǜ de yǐn shí shí jiān duì xuè táng wěn dìng yě zhì guān zhòng yào.
key_sentences.english: Moreover, regular meal times are also crucial for maintaining stable blood sugar.

key_sentences.chinese: 她宁可每天花时间准备营养均衡的餐食，也不靠营养补充剂。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā nìng kě měi tiān huā shí jiān zhǔn bèi yíng yǎng jūn héng de cān shí, yě bù kào yíng yǎng bǔ chōng jì.
key_sentences.english: She would rather spend time every day preparing nutritionally balanced meals than rely on supplements.

key_sentences.chinese: 科学研究表明，合理搭配食物能显著提高营养的吸收效率。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kē xué yán jiū biǎo míng, hé lǐ dā pèi shí wù néng xiǎn zhù tí gāo yíng yǎng de xī shōu xiào lǜ.
key_sentences.english: Scientific research shows that a reasonable food combination can significantly improve nutrient absorption efficiency.

key_sentences.chinese: 关键在于了解自己的身体需求，而不是盲目跟随流行的节食方法。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guān jiàn zài yú liǎo jiě zì jǐ de shēn tǐ xū qiú, ér bú shì máng mù gēn suí liú xíng de jié shí fāng fǎ.
key_sentences.english: The key lies in understanding your own body's needs rather than blindly following trendy diet methods.

key_sentences.chinese: 不仅如此，过度节食还可能导致新陈代谢减慢，反而不利于减重。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, guò dù jié shí hái kě néng dǎo zhì xīn chén dài xiè jiǎn màn, fǎn ér bú lì yú jiǎn zhòng.
key_sentences.english: Moreover, excessive dieting may also slow down metabolism, which is actually not conducive to weight loss.

key_sentences.chinese: 谷物中富含膳食纤维，有助于促进消化、控制血糖，是健康饮食的重要组成部分。
key_sentences.pinyin: Gǔ wù zhōng fù hán shàn shí xiān wéi, yǒu zhù yú cù jìn xiāo huà, kòng zhì xuè táng, shì jiàn kāng yǐn shí de zhòng yào zǔ chéng bù fèn.
key_sentences.english: Grains are rich in dietary fiber, which promotes digestion and controls blood sugar — they are an important component of a healthy diet.

key_sentences.chinese: 过量摄入糖分会加快热量积累，不仅如此，还会增加患慢性病的风险。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guò liàng shè rù táng fèn huì jiā kuài rè liàng jī lěi, bù jǐn rú cǐ, hái huì zēng jiā huàn màn xìng bìng de fēng xiǎn.
key_sentences.english: Excessive intake of sugar accelerates calorie accumulation; moreover, it also increases the risk of developing chronic diseases.

key_sentences.chinese: 矿物质和微量元素虽然需要量少，但对维持正常生理功能不可或缺。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kuàng wù zhì hé wēi liàng yuán sù suī rán xū yào liàng shǎo, dàn duì wéi chí zhèng cháng shēng lǐ gōng néng bù kě huò quē.
key_sentences.english: Although minerals and trace elements are needed in small amounts, they are indispensable for maintaining normal physiological functions.

key_sentences.chinese: 碳水化合物是人体能量的主要来源，关键在于选择谷物等富含纤维的天然食物。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tàn shuǐ huà hé wù shì rén tǐ néng liàng de zhǔ yào lái yuán, guān jiàn zài yú xuǎn zé gǔ wù děng fù hán xiān wéi de tiān rán shí wù.
key_sentences.english: Carbohydrates are the main source of energy for the human body; the key lies in choosing natural foods rich in fiber, such as grains.

key_sentences.chinese: 合理搭配蛋白质、脂肪、碳水化合物及矿物质，是预防慢性病、维持长期健康的科学基础。
key_sentences.pinyin: Hé lǐ dā pèi dàn bái zhì, zhī fáng, tàn shuǐ huà hé wù jí kuàng wù zhì, shì yù fáng màn xìng bìng, wéi chí cháng qī jiàn kāng de kē xué jī chǔ.
key_sentences.english: Properly combining proteins, fats, carbohydrates, and minerals is the scientific foundation for preventing chronic diseases and maintaining long-term health.

grammar_points.title: 即 — That is / Namely / Which is (formal)
grammar_points.explanation: 即 is a formal/literary conjunction meaning 'that is,' 'namely,' or 'which is.' It introduces a definition or clarification of what was just mentioned. Structure: [term] + 即 + [explanation or equivalent]. 即 is more literary than 就是 and appears mainly in written Chinese, academic texts, and formal speech. It can also mean 'immediately' in other contexts (即刻 = right away, 即将 = about to).

examples.chinese: 良好的饮食习惯，即荤素搭配、控制糖分，是预防慢性病的基础。
examples.pinyin: Liáng hǎo de yǐn shí xí guàn, jí hūn sù dā pèi、kòng zhì táng fēn, shì yù fáng màn xìng bìng de jī chǔ.
examples.english: Good dietary habits — namely, balancing meat and vegetables and controlling sugar — form the basis for preventing chronic diseases.

examples.chinese: 体内多余的热量，即未被消耗的能量，最终会转化为脂肪储存。
examples.pinyin: Tǐ nèi duō yú de rè liàng, jí wèi bèi xiāo hào de néng liàng, zuì zhōng huì zhuǎn huà wéi zhī fáng chǔ cún.
examples.english: Excess calories in the body — that is, energy that has not been consumed — are ultimately converted and stored as fat.

exercises.question: 合理的饮食，___荤素搭配、控制热量，是维持健康的基本原则。
脂肪，___人体储存能量的方式之一，在均衡饮食中也占有一定比例。
个别人群的特殊需求，___对某些营养素有较高的摄入需求，应当得到关注。
Which sentence uses 即 correctly to mean 'that is / namely'?
exercises.correct: 非荤食品，即不含动物成分的食品，在素食者中非常受欢迎。
options: 非荤食品，即不含动物成分的食品，在素食者中非常受欢迎。
他即吃荤，也吃素，饮食很均衡。
即糖分过多会导致慢性病，要注意控制。
这种食品即是健康的，就是不好吃。

exercises.question: 消化系统，___负责分解食物和吸收营养的器官系统，是维持生命的关键。

mini_exercises.question: 即 (in the sense of 'that is / namely') is best described as...
mini_exercises.correct: A formal connector that introduces a definition or clarification of something just mentioned
options: A formal connector that introduces a definition or clarification of something just mentioned
A conjunction that introduces a contrast or unexpected result
An adverb expressing immediacy or urgency
A particle that indicates a condition being met

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Good dietary habits — namely, balancing meat and vegetables — are the basis of health.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 良好的饮食习惯，___荤素搭配、控制热量，是健康的基础。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 良好的饮食习惯，___荤素搭配、控制热量，是健康的基础。
mini_exercises.question_english: Good dietary habits — namely, balancing meat and vegetables and controlling calories — are the foundation of health.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 即 to mean 'that is / namely'?
mini_exercises.correct: 纤维，即膳食中难以消化的成分，有助于促进消化。
options: 纤维，即膳食中难以消化的成分，有助于促进消化。
纤维即是一种维生素，非常重要。
option_pinyin: xiān wéi jí shàn shí zhōng nán yǐ xiāo huà de chéng fèn yǒu zhù yú cù jìn xiāo huà
jí xiān wéi hěn duō suǒ yǐ jiàn kāng
tā jí chī sù yě xǐ huān chī hūn
xiān wéi jí shì yī zhǒng wéi shēng sù fēi cháng zhòng yào

grammar_points.title: 个别 — Individual / Particular / Isolated (case)
grammar_points.explanation: 个别 is an adjective meaning 'individual,' 'particular,' or 'isolated.' It describes a single case or a small minority that differs from the general pattern. Structure: 个别 + Noun (+ predicate). 个别 highlights exceptional or isolated cases rather than the norm. It is often used in contrast with 一般 (generally) or 普遍 (universally). Unlike 各自 (each person separately), 个别 means 'only a few exceptional cases.'

examples.chinese: 个别人群对某些食物过敏，需要特别注意饮食搭配。
examples.pinyin: Gè bié rén qún duì mǒu xiē shí wù guò mǐn, xū yào tè bié zhù yì yǐn shí dā pèi.
examples.english: Certain individuals are allergic to some foods and need to pay special attention to dietary combinations.

examples.chinese: 个别食品中含有过量的糖分，消费者购买时应仔细查看成分表。
examples.pinyin: Gè bié shí pǐn zhōng hán yǒu guò liàng de táng fēn, xiāo fèi zhě gòu mǎi shí yīng zǐ xì chá kàn chéng fèn biǎo.
examples.english: Some individual food products contain excessive amounts of sugar; consumers should carefully check the ingredient list when purchasing.

exercises.question: _____人对荤食完全不耐受，必须坚持纯素饮食，这种情况比较少见。
_____食品的热量极高，消费者应非常谨慎，不宜长期大量食用。
虽然_____情况需要特殊饮食，但大多数人只需均衡摄入荤素即可。
Which sentence uses 个别 correctly?
exercises.correct: 个别食物中的脂肪含量极高，非健康人群不宜多食。
options: 个别食物中的脂肪含量极高，非健康人群不宜多食。
个别所有的食品都含糖分。
个别均衡饮食对每个人都适用。
他们个别了自己的饮食计划。

exercises.question: 这种饮食方案适合大多数人，但_____患有特殊慢性病的人需要遵医嘱调整。

mini_exercises.question: 个别 is used to describe...
mini_exercises.correct: A small minority or isolated exception — a case that differs from the general pattern
options: A small minority or isolated exception — a case that differs from the general pattern
Every single item or person considered one by one
The general rule that applies to most cases
Items that are grouped together by category

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Some individuals are allergic to certain foods and need special dietary attention.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___人群对某些食物过敏，需要特别注意饮食搭配。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___人群对某些食物过敏，需要特别注意饮食搭配。
mini_exercises.question_english: Certain individuals are allergic to some foods and need to pay special attention to dietary combinations.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 个别?
mini_exercises.correct: 个别食品中的糖分超标，消费者应注意查看成分表。
options: 个别食品中的糖分超标，消费者应注意查看成分表。
个别所有的食品都含糖分。
他们个别地吃了同一道菜。
饮食个别地影响了所有人的健康。
option_pinyin: gè bié shí pǐn zhōng de táng fēn chāo biāo xiāo fèi zhě yīng zhù yì chá kàn chéng fèn biǎo
gè bié suǒ yǒu de shí pǐn dōu hán táng fēn
tā men gè bié de chī le tóng yī dào cài
yǐn shí gè bié de yǐng xiǎng le suǒ yǒu rén de jiàn kāng

grammar_points.title: 非 — Not / Non- / Must (formal/literary)
grammar_points.explanation: 非 is a classical Chinese particle with several uses in modern formal Chinese: (1) 非 + Noun/Adjective — formal negation, equivalent of 不是 (e.g., 非荤食品 = non-meat products); (2) 并非 — 'is not; is by no means' (emphatic denial); (3) 非…不可 — 'must; have no choice but to' (strong necessity). 非 appears mainly in formal writing, academic texts, notices, and set phrases, giving a more authoritative tone than 不是 or 不.

examples.chinese: 均衡饮食并非难事，只需注意荤素搭配和热量的合理摄入。
examples.pinyin: Jūn héng yǐn shí bìng fēi nán shì, zhǐ xū zhù yì hūn sù dā pèi hé rè liàng de hé lǐ shè rù.
examples.english: Maintaining a balanced diet is by no means difficult — it simply requires attention to balancing meat and vegetables and managing calorie intake.

examples.chinese: 要彻底改变个别人群的不良饮食习惯，非长期坚持不可。
examples.pinyin: Yào chè dǐ gǎi biàn gè bié rén qún de bù liáng yǐn shí xí guàn, fēi cháng qī jiān chí bù kě.
examples.english: To completely change the unhealthy dietary habits of certain individuals, one must persist for a long time without fail.

exercises.question: 均衡饮食并___难事，任何人只要注意荤素搭配即可做到。
这种食品属于___荤食品，适合素食者食用。
要真正改善饮食习惯，___持之以恒不可，个别人更需要专业指导。
Which sentence uses 非 correctly?
exercises.correct: 这道菜并非荤食，不含任何动物成分。
options: 这道菜并非荤食，不含任何动物成分。
他非常喜欢吃素，所以他非健康。
非个别人都喜欢荤素搭配。

exercises.question: 要控制体内糖分，___减少加工食品的摄入不可，这是个别专家的共同建议。

mini_exercises.question: 非 has multiple uses. Which use does 并非 represent?
mini_exercises.correct: Formal negation: 'is not; is by no means' — a stronger, more emphatic denial than 不是
options: Formal negation: 'is not; is by no means' — a stronger, more emphatic denial than 不是
A strong necessity: 'must; have no choice but to'

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Maintaining a balanced diet is by no means difficult.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 均衡饮食并___难事，只需注意荤素搭配即可。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 均衡饮食并___难事，只需注意荤素搭配即可。
mini_exercises.question_english: Maintaining a balanced diet is by no means difficult — just pay attention to balancing meat and vegetables.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 非…不可?
mini_exercises.correct: 要养成健康的饮食习惯，非坚持不可。
options: 要养成健康的饮食习惯，非坚持不可。
他非是个别情况，不可以吃荤。
非荤食不可以吃，只能吃素。
option_pinyin: yào yǎng chéng jiàn kāng de yǐn shí xí guàn fēi jiān chí bù kě
fēi tā chī le sù shí bù kě
tā fēi shì gè bié qíng kuàng bù kě yǐ chī hūn
fēi hūn shí bù kě yǐ chī zhǐ néng chī sù

culture_notes.title: Food as Medicine: The Chinese Principle of 药食同源
culture_notes.content:
药食同源 (yào shí tóng yuán) literally means 'medicine and food share the same origin.' This ancient concept from Traditional Chinese Medicine (中医 zhōng yī) holds that many foods serve as medicine, and that the distinction between food and remedy is not absolute.

In Chinese culture, food is not merely fuel — it is also a way to maintain balance, prevent illness, and restore health. Foods are categorized by their 'nature' (性质 xìngzhì): warm (温 wēn), cool (凉 liáng), hot (热 rè), or cold (寒 hán), and their flavor (味 wèi): sweet (甜 tián), sour (酸 suān), bitter (苦 kǔ), spicy (辣 là), salty (咸 xián).

For example, ginger (生姜 shēng jiāng) is considered warming and is used to treat colds. Green tea (绿茶 lǜ chá) is cooling and said to clear internal heat. Red dates (红枣 hóng zǎo) are sweet and nourishing for the blood.

This philosophy has shaped Chinese cooking for thousands of years. A skilled Chinese cook considers not just taste, but the health effects of each ingredient. Today, 药食同源 continues to influence how Chinese families eat — seasonal eating, congee (粥 zhōu) for recovery, and soup-based meals are all expressions of this wisdom.

quiz.question: 过量摄入_____会加速热量积累，增加患慢性病的风险。
关键在于 is used to:
碳水化合物是人体能量的主要来源，其中_____含有丰富的膳食纤维。
Choose the correct sentence using 不仅如此:
choices: 这种方法有效，不仅如此，副作用也很少。
不仅如此他很累，所以去睡了。
他不仅如此，虽然努力了。

quiz.question: Which phrase refers to nutrients the body needs only in very small amounts, such as iron and zinc?
宁可…也不 expresses:
choices: A preference — choosing one thing over another

quiz.question: What does 药食同源 mean?
choices: Medicine and food share the same origin
Vitamins are more important than diet

quiz.question: Fill in: 健康的___是均衡饮食，而不是极端节食。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 加缪，你最近在健身，饮食上有什么变化吗？
lines.pinyin: Jiā miù, nǐ zuì jìn zài jiàn shēn, yǐn shí shàng yǒu shén me biàn huà ma?
lines.english: Camus, you've been working out lately — have you made any changes to your diet?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有啊，我开始注重蛋白质、维生素和膳食纤维的摄入，减少脂肪和糖分。关键在于均衡，而不是单纯少吃。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu a, wǒ kāi shǐ zhù zhòng dàn bái zhì, wéi shēng sù hé shàn shí xiān wéi de shè rù, jiǎn shǎo zhī fáng hé táng fēn. Guān jiàn zài yú jūn héng, ér bú shì dān chún shǎo chī.
lines.english: Yes, I've started paying more attention to protein, vitamins and dietary fiber intake and reducing fat and sugar. The key lies in balance, not just eating less.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不仅如此，还有微量元素，比如钙、铁、锰、钾等。以及运动、睡眠和压力管理，这些都很重要吧？
lines.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, hái yǒu wēi liàng yuán sù, bǐ rú gài tiě měng jiǎ děng, yǐ jí yùn dòng, shuì mián hé yā lì guǎn lǐ, zhè xiē dōu hěn zhòng yào ba?
lines.english: Moreover, also important are trace elements such as calcium, iron, manganese, and potassium. And exercise, sleep, and stress management are also crucial, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，这些都影响新陈代谢。我宁可每天多花一小时准备营养餐，也不依赖外卖。
lines.pinyin: Duì, zhè xiē dōu yǐng xiǎng xīn chén dài xiè. Wǒ nìng kě měi tiān duō huā yī xiǎo shí zhǔn bèi yíng yǎng cān, yě bù yī lài wài mài.
lines.english: Right, these all affect metabolism. I'd rather spend an extra hour preparing nutritious meals every day than rely on takeout.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这种坚持真让我佩服。科学饮食确实需要长期的自律。
lines.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng jiān chí zhēn ràng wǒ pèi fú. Kē xué yǐn shí quē shí xū yào cháng qī de zì lǜ.
lines.english: This kind of dedication is truly admirable. Scientific eating does require long-term self-discipline.

dialogues.title: Food as medicine — a Chinese perspective

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我最近了解到中医的药食同源理念，觉得很有道理。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuì jìn liǎo jiě dào zhōng yī de yào shí tóng yuán lǐ niàn, jué de hěn yǒu dào lǐ.
lines.english: I've recently learned about the traditional Chinese medicine concept of 'food as medicine' — I think it makes a lot of sense.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对，中国人自古就认为食物不仅仅是果腹的，而是养生的工具。
lines.pinyin: Duì, Zhōng guó rén zì gǔ jiù rèn wéi shí wù bù jǐn jǐn shì guǒ fù de, ér shì yǎng shēng de gōng jù.
lines.english: Right, the Chinese have long believed that food is not merely for filling one's stomach, but is a tool for maintaining health.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不仅如此，食物还分寒热性质，可以调节身体的平衡。
lines.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, shí wù hái fēn hán rè xìng zhì, kě yǐ tiáo jié shēn tǐ de píng héng.
lines.english: Moreover, foods are also categorized by cold and warm properties and can regulate the body's balance.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这让我想起祖母，她总说冬天要多吃生姜，夏天多喝绿茶。原来都有科学依据。
lines.pinyin: Zhè ràng wǒ xiǎng qǐ zǔ mǔ,tā zǒng shuō dōng tiān yào duō chī shēng jiāng, xià tiān duō hē lǜ chá. Yuán lái dōu yǒu kē xué yī jù.
lines.english: That reminds me — my grandmother always said to eat more ginger in winter and drink more green tea in summer. Turns out there's scientific reasoning behind it all.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊，关键在于尊重传统智慧，同时结合现代营养学，这才是最科学的饮食方式。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, guān jiàn zài yú zūn zhòng chuán tǒng zhì huì, tóng shí jié hé xiàn dài yíng yǎng xué, zhè cái shì zuì kē xué de yǐn shí fāng shì.
lines.english: Indeed, the key lies in respecting traditional wisdom while combining it with modern nutrition — that is the most scientific approach to eating.
